name: Sookhi Gobi- Cauliflower, Ginger, Garlic & Chiles - India
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 inches fresh ginger root, cut into fine shreds
1/2 tsp chili powder, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat oil in a wok over high heat.
2. Add cumin and mustard seeds. Once the seeds begin to pop (a few seconds), add garlic, ginger, cauliflower, and green chilies.
3. Stir-fry for 5-7 minutes until the cauliflower turns slightly brown.
4. Add salt, black pepper, Garam Masala, and chili powder; mix well.
5. Stir in 2 tablespoons water and cover the wok immediately.
6. Cook for 2 minutes and serve.
